name: Bryte Insurance Company Limited
description: Bryte Insurance Company Limited offers a comprehensive range of travel insurance plans that cater to various traveler needs. Their policies include benefits such as emergency medical expenses, coverage for infectious diseases, and assistance while abroad, ensuring a proactive approach to travel protection.

name: Reliance General Insurance
description: Reliance General Insurance offers a comprehensive Travel Care Insurance policy designed to cover various risks associated with international travel. Key benefits include medical coverage, personal accident protection, and compensation for trip cancellations or delays, ensuring travelers have access to essential support during their journeys.

name: Allianz Türkiye
description: Allianz Türkiye offers a variety of insurance products, including health insurance policies that may be relevant for travelers seeking coverage. Their Allianz Health Wallet provides users with discounts on complementary health policies, and the Allianz'ım mobile application allows for easy management of health-related services.

name: RELIGARE HEALTH INSURANCE (RHI)
description: Care Health Insurance offers the "Explore" international travel insurance plan, which provides comprehensive protection against health and travel-related emergencies during your overseas journey. This plan covers emergency hospitalization, trip cancellations, loss of baggage, and other non-medical contingencies, ensuring peace of mind while traveling.

name: International SOS
description: International SOS offers comprehensive personal travel insurance and assistance, ensuring support for individuals and families while traveling internationally. Their services include emergency medical evacuation, 24/7 assistance, and access to health and security travel guides, empowering travelers with peace of mind and expert help during emergencies.

name: Generali Global Assistance
description: Generali Global Assistance offers a range of travel insurance products designed to protect your vacation investment from unforeseen events like trip cancellations, delays, or medical emergencies. Their plans include comprehensive coverage, 24/7 emergency assistance, and a 10-day free look period for added peace of mind.

name: Travelers Syndicate Management
description: Travelers specializes in providing tailored insurance solutions for small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs), including comprehensive coverage options such as Management Liability Insurance and CyberRisk protection. With a commitment to supporting the ambitions of SMEs, Travelers offers a dedicated team and flexible trading options to address the complex risks faced by businesses today.

name: Continental International Group
description: The Continental Group offers a variety of insurance options, including travel insurance, which is designed to provide robust protection for travelers. With their commitment to tailored financial solutions and quality advice, clients can expect comprehensive coverage for their travel needs.

name: Tune Protect
description: Tune Protect offers comprehensive travel protection plans that ensure a worry-free experience for various travel types, whether for business or leisure. Their insurance products are designed to cover a range of misadventures, allowing travelers to explore with peace of mind.

name: Applied Warranty & Insurance Services
description: The company offers a range of specialty insurance programs, including travel insurance, emphasizing their expertise in underwriting and product development. Their coverage is rated ‘A-’ (Excellent) by AM Best, ensuring reliable options for travelers.
